examples: How this rarified group USES their cash differentiates them from the rest of us - and keeps them in the black.
Now you are about to join another rarified club, one of former First Children ‚Äì a position you didn't seek and one with no guidelines.
Like the fly that nourishes itself on death, I discern the specter of the grave in all its manifestations, from the grossest to the most rarified.
So intoxicating was the rarified air of the money management profession to a new-comer.
Outside the rarified realm of high-end matchmakers, of course, love is simple and everyone lives happily ever after.
